title: Balanced Crafting Recipes
description: Don't Waste Your Time and Items!
body:
# ⚠️WAIT!!⚠️
This datapack was created by an **_inexperienced, non-English speaking_** developer, so please be aware that there may be oddities in the descriptions here, or that some features in this datapack may not work.

Also, this datapack is licensed [CC-BY](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en), which means you can use this datapack without permission for modpack or unofficial mod support, **_but please leave credit as possible!_**

## What Is This?
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/75QDpMJ46PQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Don't want to take the time to create it in a few steps? Or are you frustrated that you can't enhance the gear you're wearing?

Don't worry, this datapack focuses on adding features such as being able to craft single steps, or being able to upgrade each other's pre-Netherite gear.
and also made it possible to deconstruct certain items into ingredients in certain recipes, or to use items that weren't originally ingredients as ingredients.

To make it easier to understand, here's an example...
| Stone Crafting Material Addition | Universal Dying |
| ------------- | ------------- |
| ![Stone Pickaxe!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50ba3d6337802b44468e9575d70231e8043eafca.png) | ![Okay That's Make Easier Dyings!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6ddd0cde89373861958f75a985908b56dffd51f.png) |

| Pre-Netherite Gear Upgrade | Dupe Pottery Shard |
| ------------- | ------------- |
| ![well](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43e31af6884250a183c00090db1058d9c251243d.png) | ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2678acdd2d81b10e38bdf1ae91acf27046a81e49.png) |

Also, various recipes such as glass bottles, pistons, etc. have been modified to make them more convenient~!
and this datapack is still hard to find natively without recipe mode, so I recommend it if you can! **(Especially [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi))**
